findings.evidence: Docstring lines 149-151 say “For a non-torsion period... on a preconnected domain”, while the declaration at lines 152-153 includes `[TotallyDisconnectedSpace (zmultiples p)]` in addition to `[PreconnectedSpace 𝕜]` and `hp`.
findings.fix: State the totally-disconnected/discrete-period hypothesis wherever the `Multiplicative ℤ` deck-group computation is described.
findings.issue: `addCircleMulEquivInt` is documented as requiring only a non-torsion period on a preconnected domain, but the theorem also requires `[TotallyDisconnectedSpace (zmultiples p)]`; the module summary/main-declaration text at lines 26-38 repeats the same overclaim.

summary: The new files have module docstrings and the main APIs are mostly documented, but one main docstring overclaims by omitting a required topological hypothesis.
